You have yet to decide which heritage you are born into.
layer.runic_races.family.name: Heritage
layer.runic_races.race.missing_origin.de: You have not yet chosen a race.
layer.runic_races.race.name: Race
message.runic_races.changeling.mirror_sh: You slip behind a borrowed face.
message.runic_races.deep_one.sunlight.st: The surface glare dazzles and slows you.
message.runic_races.dryad.fire.start: Fire! Your bark and leaves catch fast.
message.runic_races.feline.submerged.sta: Water soaks your fur — every blow lands harder.
message.runic_races.frost_one.fire.start: Fire! The heat unmakes your cold flesh.
message.runic_races.ice_drake.fire.start: Fire! Your rimescale hisses and cracks.
message.runic_races.learning.adaptation_: You begin adapting to your surroundings.
You feel at home in this land.
message.runic_races.learning.biome_hosti: This land is hostile to your kind.
message.runic_races.nymph.fire.start: Fire! The heat withers your spirit.
message.runic_races.nymph.sirens_charm: Your charm enthralls all who watch.
message.runic_races.reaper.soul_harvest: You reap the souls of the fallen!
message.runic_races.reaper.sunlight.star: The living sun shuns your grave-touched flesh.
message.runic_races.sea_serpen.fire.star: Fire! Your scales dry and split.
message.runic_races.signature.avian.wing: You beat your wings and rise!
message.runic_races.signature.feline.nin: You land on your feet — a life spent!
message.runic_races.signature.reaper.rev: Death's door swings open — you rise again!
The grave refuses you... not yet.
A rune of power blazes to life!
message.runic_races.signature.terra_drak: You breathe the weight of the mountain!
message.runic_races.skeleton.sunlight.st: You slip back into the shade.
The close dark presses in — you long for the peaks.
message.runic_races.sprite.phase_shift: You flicker out of harm's way!
Under the open sky, the storm answers your call.
Cut off from the sky, your power dims.
message.runic_races.volt_drake.submerged: Water grounds your storm — your scales spark and sputter.
message.runic_races.wind_wyrm.tight_spac: Walls close around your wings — you cannot soar.
The open sky is yours again.
message.runic_races.zombie.sunlight.star: Your flesh begins to rot in the sunlight.
message.runic_races.zombie.sunlight.stop: You shrink back from the killing light.
origin.runic_races.arachnid.description: Patient weavers born of silk and shadow who read the world through vibration; venomous, precise, oath-bound.
origin.runic_races.arachnid.name: Arachnid (Bestial)
origin.runic_races.avian.description: Proud, sharp-eyed folk of skyborne blood; scouts and storm-watchers bound to wind and song.
origin.runic_races.avian.name: Avian (Bestial)
origin.runic_races.blood_elf.description: Proud elves of crimson rites and bloodcraft; relentless survivors who pay power's price in blood.
origin.runic_races.blood_elf.name: Blood Elf (Elven)
origin.runic_races.canine.description: Loyal, resilient folk of wolf and hound blood; pack-bound hunters and trackers.
origin.runic_races.canine.name: Canine (Bestial)
origin.runic_races.celeron.description: Swift, witty wanderers of the messenger god's line; they prize speed, truth, and the open road.
origin.runic_races.celeron.name: Celeron (Human)
origin.runic_races.changeling.descriptio: Mysterious shapeshifters who wear faces like masks; spies and infiltrators free to define themselves beyond blood.
origin.runic_races.changeling.name: Changeling (Faeborne)
origin.runic_races.dark_elf.description: Secretive masters of shadow and intrigue from moonless caverns; assassins who answer betrayal without mercy.
origin.runic_races.dark_elf.name: Dark Elf (Elven)
origin.runic_races.deep_one.description: Ancient dwarves of the world's lowest halls where sunlight is legend; unmatched miners with darkvision and stubborn will.
origin.runic_races.deep_one.name: Deep One (Dwarven)
origin.runic_races.demon.description: Fierce infernal beings of cursed realms; horned and burning-eyed masters of fire and forbidden power who seize fate by force.
origin.runic_races.demon.name: Demon (Undead)
origin.runic_races.dryad.description: Graceful forest-born fae bound to grove and root; gentle healers whose wrath is as old and unforgiving as the forest.
origin.runic_races.dryad.name: Dryad (Faeborne)
origin.runic_races.faerie.description: Small, magical fae of ancient glades and moonlit flowers; whimsical tricksters whose magic can bless, confuse, protect, or punish.
origin.runic_races.faerie.name: Faerie (Faeborne)
origin.runic_races.family_bestial.descri: Folk of ancient beast bloodlines, gifted with sharp senses, agility, and predatory instinct.
origin.runic_races.family_bestial.name: Bestial
origin.runic_races.family_draconic.descr: Drakes and wyrms of elemental power: armored, breath-wielding flyers, each strong in one element and weak to its opposite.
origin.runic_races.family_draconic.name: Draconic
origin.runic_races.family_dwarven.descri: Stout folk of stone and forge: armored, enduring, and unmatched below the earth, but slow and magic-poor.
origin.runic_races.family_dwarven.name: Dwarven
origin.runic_races.family_elven.descript: Ancient and graceful, the elves command arcane tradition and keen senses at the cost of fragile bodies.
origin.runic_races.family_elven.name: Elven
origin.runic_races.family_faeborne.descr: Small fae of wild magic and illusion: swift, magical, and often winged, but delicate of body.
origin.runic_races.family_faeborne.name: Faeborne
origin.runic_races.family_human.descript: The mortal races of humankind: adaptable, fortunate, and unspecialized, shaping the world to their will.
origin.runic_races.family_human.name: Human
origin.runic_races.family_undead.descrip: Those who refused to rest: tireless and immune to many ills, but undone by sunlight and the holy.
origin.runic_races.family_undead.name: Undead
origin.runic_races.feline.description: Graceful, instinctive folk of catlike blood; agile night-stalkers whose elegance hides predatory confidence.
origin.runic_races.feline.name: Feline (Bestial)
origin.runic_races.fire_drake.descriptio: Drakes of ember and ash whose hearts burn like a forge; their breath is living flame and their scales drink the heat.
origin.runic_races.fire_drake.name: Fire Drake (Draconic)
origin.runic_races.forge_one.description: Dwarves born to hammer and heat; master smiths whose work outlasts its maker, proven in fire.
origin.runic_races.forge_one.name: Forge One (Dwarven)
origin.runic_races.frost_one.description: Hardy dwarves of glacial halls and bitter winds; cold-immune survivors whose hearts burn warm beneath frost.
origin.runic_races.frost_one.name: Frost One (Dwarven)
origin.runic_races.high_elf.description: Ancient, disciplined masters of arcane tradition; proud keepers of old magic.
origin.runic_races.high_elf.name: High Elf (Elven)
origin.runic_races.ice_drake.description: Pale drakes of glacier and rime; their breath is a killing cold and their scales never thaw.
origin.runic_races.ice_drake.name: Ice Drake (Draconic)
origin.runic_races.ice_elf.description: Cold, disciplined elves of glacial halls and northern lights; frost-mages and wardens, patient and steadfast.
origin.runic_races.ice_elf.name: Ice Elf (Elven)
origin.runic_races.iron_one.description: Stern, battle-hardened dwarves of fortress-holds; tough as forged plate, made to stand where others break.
origin.runic_races.iron_one.name: Iron One (Dwarven)
origin.runic_races.kitsune.description: Clever fox-spirits of enchanted blood; illusionists and wandering sages whose charm and hidden fire grow with age.
origin.runic_races.kitsune.name: Kitsune (Bestial)
origin.runic_races.magi.description: Humans birthed from raw magic — Primian descendants who survived lethal arcane overexposure; magic flows where blood should.
origin.runic_races.magi.name: Magi (Human)
origin.runic_races.moon_elf.description: Graceful elves bound to moonlight and tides; seers and silvered spellcasters, gentle yet dangerous beneath the stars.
origin.runic_races.moon_elf.name: Moon Elf (Elven)
origin.runic_races.nymph.description: Graceful nature spirits of rivers and springs; charming healers and enchantresses fierce in defense of their waters.
origin.runic_races.nymph.name: Nymph (Faeborne)
origin.runic_races.primian.description: The first humans: fortune, charisma, and boundless adaptability incarnate; the world quietly bends toward them.
origin.runic_races.primian.name: Primian (Human)
origin.runic_races.reaper.description: Grim harbingers touched by death's silence; soul-reaping executioners and solemn guardians of the final passage.
origin.runic_races.reaper.name: Reaper (Undead)
origin.runic_races.runic_one.description: Dwarves steeped in stone-carved runes; rune-smiths who bind power into steel and stone, keepers of old knowledge.
origin.runic_races.runic_one.name: Runic One (Dwarven)
origin.runic_races.sea_serpen.descriptio: Great serpentine drakes of the deep; coiling masters of tide and current whose breath drowns the shore.
origin.runic_races.sea_serpen.name: Sea Serpen (Draconic)
origin.runic_races.serpen.description: Calm, dangerous folk of snake blood; venomous mystics and assassins who strike with the quiet power of the coiled strike.
origin.runic_races.serpen.name: Serpen (Bestial)
origin.runic_races.skeleton.description: Fleshless undead given motion by old oaths; eerie, tireless bonecrafters and unerring archers.
origin.runic_races.skeleton.name: Skeleton (Undead)
origin.runic_races.sky_one.description: Proud mountain dwarves of wind-cut citadels above the clouds; sure-footed climbers and sharp-eyed sentries of the heights.
origin.runic_races.sky_one.name: Sky One (Dwarven)
origin.runic_races.sprite.description: Tiny, lively fae of wild magic and starlight; quick-winged pranksters far more dangerous than they appear.
origin.runic_races.sprite.name: Sprite (Faeborne)
origin.runic_races.terra_drake.descripti: Mountainous drakes of stone and root; their hide is living rock and their breath shatters the earth.
origin.runic_races.terra_drake.name: Terra Drake (Draconic)
origin.runic_races.valen.description: Valiant, honorable humans of unbending strength — the immovable rock that corners a foe — living in equilibrium with nature.
origin.runic_races.valen.name: Valen (Human)
origin.runic_races.volt_drake.descriptio: Swift drakes wreathed in storm-light; their breath is the thunderbolt and their wings outrun the gale.
origin.runic_races.volt_drake.name: Volt Drake (Draconic)
origin.runic_races.wind_wyrm.description: Sinuous sky-wyrms born of the high winds; the freest and most ancient of drakes, riding the jetstreams above the clouds.
origin.runic_races.wind_wyrm.name: Wind Wyrm (Draconic)
origin.runic_races.wraith.description: Spectral undead shaped by sorrow and vengeance; silent, shadow-bound hunters who drain the soul and haunt forgotten graves.
origin.runic_races.wraith.name: Wraith (Undead)
origin.runic_races.zombie.description: Undead animated by plague and stubborn refusal to rest; tireless, pain-resistant, and grimly hard to put down.
origin.runic_races.zombie.name: Zombie (Undead)
power.runic_races.arachnid.fragile_carap: -1.5 hearts and +20% fire damage taken. Spiders fear flame.
power.runic_races.arachnid.weavers_sense: Poison immunity, +10% attack speed, no fall damage, venomous fangs, and constant vibration-sense of nearby creatures.
power.runic_races.arachnid.web_snare.des: Cast a web: foes within 5 blocks are rooted by Slowness IV and a trap is left underfoot. 35-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.avian.hollow_bones.des: -2 hearts, easily knocked back, and -10% melee damage. A light, hollow frame.
power.runic_races.avian.skyborne.descrip: Feathered wings for gliding flight, no fall damage, +10% speed, and keen night sight.
power.runic_races.avian.skyborne.name: Skyborne
power.runic_races.avian.wind_burst.descr: Beat your wings for a skyward burst with Slow Falling. 20-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.avian.wind_burst.name: Wind Burst
power.runic_races.blood_elf.blood_frenzy: Burn your own vitality into power: Strength II and Speed I for 8s, Regeneration for 5s. 35-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.blood_elf.bloodcraft.d: +10% melee damage and +10% magic damage, and your strikes leech a fifth of the damage dealt. Blood is power.
power.runic_races.blood_elf.price_of_pow: -1.5 hearts and -30% natural healing. Power always has its price.
power.runic_races.canine.howl_of_the_pac: Howl: gain Strength and Speed and mark wounded prey for 10s. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.canine.pack_hunter.des: +12% speed, night vision, +10% melee damage, and at home in the forest.
power.runic_races.canine.ravenous.descri: +40% hunger drain and -2 armor. Always hungry, thin of hide.
power.runic_races.canine.ravenous.name: Ravenous
power.runic_races.celeron.featherweight_: -2 hearts and you are knocked back further than most.
power.runic_races.celeron.fleet_and_sure: +12% movement speed and +10% attack speed. The road never tires you.
power.runic_races.celeron.messengers_das: Dash forward with Speed III for 4s. 25-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.changeling.hollow_iden: -1 heart and -10% attack damage. With no true self, no strike lands with full conviction.
power.runic_races.changeling.manyfaces.d: +10% movement speed and +1 Luck. You wear whatever face the moment needs.
power.runic_races.changeling.mirror_shif: Slip away behind a glamour: Invisibility and Speed for 6s. 40-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.dark_elf.children_of_d: Night vision, +10% movement speed, and your strikes hit harder in the dark of night — but falter under the open daytime sky.
power.runic_races.dark_elf.shadowmeld.de: Vanish into shadow: Invisibility and Speed II for 6s. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.dark_elf.sunlight_sens: -1 heart and you are sluggish and weaker under direct daylight.
Darkvision, +2 armor, immunity to Mining Fatigue, and faster mining underground.
power.runic_races.deep_one.sunlight_blin: -5% speed always; under open sky you are slowed and weakened by the glare.
power.runic_races.deep_one.tremorsense.d: Read the stone: nearby hostiles are revealed through walls. Best underground. 15-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.demon.holy_vulnerabili: +25% damage from holy magic, +20% damage while in water, and -25% natural healing.
power.runic_races.demon.infernal_blood.d: Immune to fire, +15% melee damage, and stronger in the heat.
power.runic_races.demon.infernal_wrath.d: Erupt in hellfire: gain Strength II and Fire Resistance while nearby foes are set ablaze and Weakened. 50-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.dryad.kindling.descrip: Fire deals triple damage to you. Bark and leaf burn fast.
power.runic_races.dryad.kindling.name: Kindling
power.runic_races.dryad.one_with_the_gro: Poison immunity, at home in the forest, and you slowly heal in sunlight on the open ground.
power.runic_races.dryad.verdant_bloom.de: Burst into bloom: heal yourself with Regeneration while roots slow nearby foes. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.faerie.cold_iron.descr: -2.5 hearts, +20% physical damage taken, and easily knocked from the air. Cold iron is anathema to the fae.
power.runic_races.faerie.cold_iron.name: Cold Iron
Weave an old enchantment: bless yourself with Regeneration and Absorption while cursing nearby foes with Slowness, Blindness, and Levitation. 50-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.faerie.pixie_flight.de: Delicate wings for gliding flight, Slow Falling, +15% magic damage, +20% speed, and night vision.
power.runic_races.feline.hydrophobia.des: -1.5 hearts and +30% damage taken while in water.
power.runic_races.feline.nine_lives.desc: Cheat death once every 10 minutes, landing on your feet. Night vision, +15% attack speed, and no fall damage.
power.runic_races.feline.nine_lives.name: Nine Lives & Night Eyes
power.runic_races.feline.pounce.descript: Leap at your prey with a burst of Strength. 15-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.feline.pounce.name: Pounce
power.runic_races.fire_drake.cold_quench: +30% cold damage taken, +20% hunger drain. Cold and water are your bane.
power.runic_races.fire_drake.dragonfire_: Breathe a cone of searing flame that ignites all it touches. 40-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.fire_drake.emberscale_: Immune to fire and lava, +3 armor, +10% melee damage, gliding wings, and stronger in the heat.
power.runic_races.forge_one.forge_blessi: Call the forge's fire into your body: Strength and Fire Resistance for 10s. 50-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.forge_one.ironhand_smi: 50% fire resistance, +2 armor, and +10% melee damage. Worth proven in fire.
-10% movement speed and -10% attack speed; you flounder in deep water.
power.runic_races.frost_one.forged_for_c: +25% fire damage taken and -5% speed. Heat unmakes you.
power.runic_races.frost_one.frostborn.de: Immune to freezing, +2 hearts, +1 armor, and at home in the cold.
power.runic_races.frost_one.glacial_reso: Dig in against the cold: Resistance II and Fire Resistance for 8s. 55-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.high_elf.arcane_master: +15% magic damage and night vision. Centuries of study made manifest.
power.runic_races.high_elf.arcane_reflex: Snap up an arcane shield: Absorption II and Resistance I for 5s, weakening nearby foes. 40-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.high_elf.fragile_grace: -2 hearts and +15% physical damage taken. Grace bought with fragility.
power.runic_races.ice_drake.frost_breath: Exhale a cone of killing frost that freezes and slows. 40-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.ice_drake.rimescale_hi: Immune to freezing, +3 armor, gliding wings, and at home in the cold.
power.runic_races.ice_drake.thaw.descrip: +30% fire damage taken and +20% hunger drain. Flame is your undoing.
power.runic_races.ice_drake.thaw.name: Thaw
power.runic_races.ice_elf.cold_blooded.d: +25% fire damage taken. Heat is your undoing.
power.runic_races.ice_elf.frostbind.desc: Loose a frost nova: foes within 6 blocks are gripped by Slowness III. 40-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.ice_elf.frostbind.name: Frostbind
Immune to freezing and +10% magic damage; the cold is your home.
power.runic_races.iron_one.forged_to_end: +2 hearts, +3 armor, and strong knockback resistance.
power.runic_races.iron_one.heavy_as_the_: -10% movement speed, -10% attack speed, and -10% magic damage.
power.runic_races.iron_one.shield_wall.d: Raise an unbreakable guard: Resistance III and Absorption II for 6s. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.kitsune.foxfire_illusi: Vanish in foxfire: gain Invisibility and Speed II while nearby foes are blinded and slowed. 40-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.kitsune.spirit_of_the_: +15% magic damage, night vision, and +10% speed.
power.runic_races.kitsune.untamed_spirit: -2 hearts and +15% physical damage taken. A spirit-frail body.
power.runic_races.magi.arcane_overflow.d: Release an arcane nova: enemies within 6 blocks are Weakened and revealed while you gain Strength. Spends 30 mana if Iron's Spellbooks is present. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.magi.volatile_vessel.d: -2 hearts and +20% physical damage taken. A frail magical frame.
power.runic_races.magi.woven_of_magic.de: +15% magic damage. Your body is suffused with arcane power.
Draw a veil of moonlight: Invisibility, Slow Falling, and Regeneration for several seconds, healing you. 50-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.moon_elf.tidecallers_g: Water breathing, night vision, and stronger natural healing under the night sky.
power.runic_races.moon_elf.waning_by_day: -1.5 hearts and -10% magic damage; your power wanes under the daytime sun.
power.runic_races.nymph.bound_to_water.d: -1.5 hearts and +20% fire damage taken; away from water, far from home, you wither.
power.runic_races.nymph.sirens_charm.des: Sing an enthralling charm: nearby foes are Slowed and Weakened while you mend with Regeneration. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.nymph.spirit_of_spring: Water breathing, +10% magic damage, and at home in and near the water.
power.runic_races.primian.boundless_adap: +1 heart, +1 Luck, +5% movement speed. You adapt to your surroundings, gaining brief speed as you explore new places.
power.runic_races.primian.jack_of_all_tr: Master of none: -10% magic damage and -5% melee damage. You hold no elemental affinity.
power.runic_races.primian.stroke_of_fort: Fortune surges: Luck II for 10s, Absorption I and Speed I for 8s. 100-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.reaper.harbinger_of_de: Immune to Wither, night vision, and +15% melee damage. Death once cheated returns you to the world (every 30 minutes).
power.runic_races.reaper.soul_harvest.de: Sweep your scythe: nearby foes are Withered and revealed while their souls mend you. 40-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.reaper.touch_of_the_gr: -2 hearts, -50% natural healing, and weakened in direct sunlight.
power.runic_races.runic_one.bound_by_tra: -2 hearts and -10% speed. A scholar, not a warrior.
power.runic_races.runic_one.rune_of_ward: Inscribe a ward of stone: Resistance and Regeneration for you while nearby foes are slowed. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.runic_one.runebound.de: +10% magic damage, +2 armor, and +1 Luck for enchanting fortune.
power.runic_races.sea_serpen.landbound_c: -1 heart and +20% fire damage taken; far from water your coils grow sluggish.
power.runic_races.sea_serpen.leviathans_: Water breathing, +3 armor, and supreme power in the open ocean.
power.runic_races.sea_serpen.tidal_breat: Unleash a crushing tide that hurls foes back and drowns them in slowness. 40-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.serpen.cold_blooded.de: -1.5 hearts and +25% freezing damage; the cold dulls your blood.
power.runic_races.serpen.shed_skin.descr: Slither free: cleanse all harmful effects and gain Invisibility and Speed for 5s. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.serpen.shed_skin.name: Shed Skin
power.runic_races.serpen.venomous_coil.d: Poison immunity, venomous fangs, +10% speed, night vision, and thriving in the heat.
power.runic_races.skeleton.brittle_bones: -2 hearts, +25% fall damage, and you take more harm in direct sunlight.
power.runic_races.skeleton.conscript_the: Raise two skeletal servants to fight at your side for a time. 70-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.skeleton.marrow_deep_a: +10% attack speed, immune to Poison and Hunger, and you need no breath.
Bound high with Slow Falling and Speed for a safe landing. 20-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.sky_one.sure_footed_se: Immune to fall damage, +1 armor, and swift in the mountains.
power.runic_races.sky_one.thin_air_lungs: -1 heart; enclosed underground you are slowed and take more harm.
power.runic_races.sprite.fragile_essence: -3 hearts and easily knocked from the air. A wisp of a body.
Gossamer wings for gliding flight, Slow Falling, +30% speed, and +15% attack speed.
power.runic_races.sprite.phase_shift.des: Flicker out of danger: blink forward with Invisibility and Speed II. 90-second cooldown.
-10% movement speed, -10% attack speed, and +20% hunger drain.
power.runic_races.terra_drake.seismic_br: Breathe the weight of the mountain: foes are battered, slowed, and shaken from cover. 40-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.terra_drake.stonescale: +4 armor, knockback immunity, Mining Fatigue immunity, faster mining, no fall damage, gliding wings, and at home in the mountains.
power.runic_races.valen.fortitude.descri: +2 hearts, +2 armor, knockback resistance, +10% melee damage, and a sprinting shoulder-check that staggers the first foe you strike.
power.runic_races.valen.fortitude.name: Fortitude
power.runic_races.valen.stalwart_not_swi: -10% movement speed and -10% attack speed. Heavy and deliberate.
power.runic_races.valen.unbreakable_stan: Plant yourself: Resistance III, Absorption II, and Slowness I for 6s. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.volt_drake.grounded.de: -1.5 hearts, +25% damage while wet, and weaker when shut away from the open sky.
power.runic_races.volt_drake.lightning_b: Loose a bolt of stormfire that stuns and dazzles. 40-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.volt_drake.stormscale_: Immune to lightning, +2 armor, +15% speed, +10% attack speed, and gliding wings.
power.runic_races.wind_wyrm.galeforce_br: Summon a roaring gale that launches foes skyward as you ride the updraft. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wind_wyrm.skylord.desc: The strongest wings of all, Slow Falling, no fall damage, and +15% speed. Born to soar.
power.runic_races.wind_wyrm.skylord.name: Skylord
power.runic_races.wind_wyrm.untethered.d: -2 hearts; shut away underground you are slowed, weakened, and take more harm.
power.runic_races.wraith.half_bound.desc: -2.5 hearts, weakened in direct sunlight, and +20% damage from holy magic.
power.runic_races.wraith.half_bound.name: Half-Bound
power.runic_races.wraith.soul_touched.de: Night vision, no fall damage, and your strikes grow deadlier in the dark of night.
Turn incorporeal: Invisibility, Resistance, and drifting Speed while you drain a sliver of life from the souls around you. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.zombie.deathless_flesh: +3 hearts, +1 armor, immune to Poison and Hunger, and hard to knock down.
-10% speed and your flesh decays in direct sunlight; you heal slowly.
Refuse to die: Resistance II, Regeneration, and Strength for 8s. 90-second cooldown.
tooltip.runic_races.state.dry_sluggish: Landbound — your coils are sluggish out of water
tooltip.runic_races.state.submerged_weak: Submerged — you take amplified damage in water
